chapter_title: About the Invocation the One approaching

hadith_entries.text:
466. Narrated A'isha: 'I listened to the Prophet before
his death, while he was leaning his back on me and saying:
"O Allah! Forgive me, and bestow Your Mercy on me, and let
me meet the highest degree in Paradise." (Bukhari)
in

467. Narrated A'isha: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah
his last moments having a vessel of water in front of him. He
used to dip his hands in the vessel and say: "O Allah! Support
me to bear the pangs of death." (At-Termizi)
